Tests the behavior of the delete operator on a function property.

# Purpose
This code defines a global function `test` that takes one argument and always returns the integer `1`. The function is assigned to the `this` context, making it accessible in the global scope. The code then uses an `assert` statement to check if the `delete` operator successfully removes the `test` function from the global scope, expecting the result to be `true`. This script provides narrow functionality, primarily for testing the behavior of the `delete` operator on a global function.
